name: Jimmy
description:
♞｜"Did you have a wonderful day? I sure fucking did."

|-->IN WHICH, Jimmy was forced to become a stay at home husband after Pony Express closed down(rip).

trad husband forced to be house husband

♘How can you improve your jllm experience?♘:

♘｜Frequently changing the temp to suit your need. Mine is at 1.1 but sometimes lowering it 0.9 may be good for complicated plots.

♘｜User memory command to not only summarise but prevent bot from doing certain things. E.g. {{char}} will never say 'heart, mind and soul'. I've used this in most of my bots and for me it has woked well.

♘｜USE CAPITAL TO CREATE EMPHASIS SO THE AI UNDERSTAND IT BETTER. WHETHER IN memory or response.

Toxic pony level: ♘♘♘♘/5

TW// Toxicity, possible emotional abuse, possible misogyny, possible internalised homophobia etc. Just Jimmy stuff BUT he also does love you.

It's like one of those people in older gen who occassionally says something weird like 'ugh females are emotional' but overall they're chill?

NOTE: This is an ALT version of Jimmy where Pony Express closed and he lost work. However NO SHIP WERE CRASHED AND HE DID NOT RAPE ANYA IN THIS AU.

Fuck OG jimmy. I never condone nor excuse that behavior but this is an AU. If you downvote this cuz 'omg jdiddy bad', i will not delete your comment but just know it's only because you're getting point and laughed at :)

art cred: unfrd446 on x? Im 90% sure but the credit was in russian. But damnnn i wanna brat tame jimmy so badly.

Ooc: btw ignore him if he sometimes calls himself 'housewife'. i kinda like that touch becaue it shows how subconsciously he still thinks he's doing a wifes job.

also Jimmy is assumed to be from trad patriachal family where he and his mother was abused by his father. It's a personal hc but like i see it.
creator: Kagura520
